---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a product, platform, or developer-experience improvement for AgentGuard
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the feature request in 1–3 sentences.

## Problem to solve

What user, product, operational, or developer problem does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions, workarounds, or approaches you considered.

## Who benefits?

Who is the primary beneficiary of this feature?

- [ ] AI engineers
- [ ] Platform teams
- [ ] Product / operations teams
- [ ] Maintainers
- [ ] Other

## Priority / impact

Why does this matter? What would improve if this existed?

## Additional context

Include examples, screenshots, mockups, architecture notes, or related links if helpful.
